typography.h1: text-5xl lg:text-7xl font-bold tracking-tighter leading-none text-zinc-950

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-px bg-zinc-200 border border-zinc-200

components.button_primary: bg-[#FF4F00] text-white rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-mono text-sm uppercase tracking-wide hover:bg-[#E64600] transition-colors border border-transparent
components.button_secondary: bg-transparent text-zinc-950 rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-mono text-sm uppercase tracking-wide border border-zinc-950 hover:bg-zinc-100 transition-colors
components.card: bg-white p-6 md:p-8 border border-zinc-200 rounded-none flex flex-col
components.badge: font-mono text-xs px-2 py-1 bg-zinc-100 text-zinc-600 border border-zinc-200

sections.layout: Dark blueprint background with heavy typography. Uses technical mono overlines. High-contrast CTA.
sections.content: Von der Konstruktion bis zur Fertigung.
sections.visuals: Use hero_background image with a heavy bg-black/80 overlay.

sections.layout: Bento grid (Mode A: Tetris) with sharp 1px borders simulating a schematic.
sections.content: Modules: Blitz Post, Brett, Fips, Paul, Klaus, Meute

sections.layout: Dark 'terminal' style box highlighting the H-7206-13282-90 structure.
sections.content: Explains CompanyCode, Status-Lifecycle, Klassen-Familien. High density mono typography.

sections.layout: Tabbed interface showing different mockups (Email, Brett, Kalender, Tasks, Bestellungen, Rudel).
Split screen data table: German text input on left, realtime EN/HU output on right.
sections.content: Jeder Datensatz in drei Sprachen - automatisch.

sections.layout: Split layout: Image on left, task pane mockup on right.
Stark, massive typography for 50€, surrounded by a structured list of features.

mockup_specifications.email_triage: List view. Each row has sender, time (mono), subject, and 3 actions (Löschen, Gelesen, Merken). Use sharp borders.
mockup_specifications.kanban_brett: 3-4 columns (Offen, In Arbeit, Warten). Cards contain mono PartIds (e.g. P26-014), tags, avatars.
mockup_specifications.bom_tree: Hierarchical list. Use border-l and border-b to draw tree branches. Monospace part numbers and status badges.
mockup_specifications.solidworks_task_pane: Narrow vertical container, dark grey background. Header: HERPERT. Buttons: LOAD SLWS, SAVE PDM (full width, mono).
mockup_specifications.dashboard_kpi: Grid of small square widgets (Mode B: Control Room). Big numbers, mono labels, small trend charts.

images.description: Blueprint mechanical drawing - used with heavy dark overlay
CNC machine operator - used for production section
Laser cutting machine - used for manufacturing context

media.icons: Use lucide-react. Prefer sharp/technical icons (Square, Terminal, GitMerge, TreeStructure, Settings2).

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL FONTS: Include IBM Plex Sans and IBM Plex Mono via Google Fonts or next/font.
NO INTER FONT: The global font must be IBM Plex Sans. Override Tailwind sans family.
NO BORDER RADIUS: All components (cards, buttons, inputs) MUST have rounded-none. This is a strict engineering aesthetic.
BORDERS EVERYWHERE: Use 1px borders heavily (border-zinc-200) to create a structured, blueprint-like grid.
MOCKUPS ARE CRITICAL: Build the interactive demo section using static UI components. It must look like real dense software.
MONO FOR DATA: Use the mono font class for all PartIds, numbers, statuses, and timestamps.
TEST IDS: Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements.
USE PROVIDED IMAGES: Use the images from the media object.
LANGUAGE: All visible text must be in German as requested.
